name: cross-lang-verifier
description: Surface C→{Rust,Go,Swift} cross-language semantic divergences in-editor, backed by the real oracle CLI.

commands.title: Cross-Lang Verifier: Verify divergences for a units manifest

crossLangVerifier.pythonPath.description: Python interpreter used to run the cross-lang-verify CLI.

crossLangVerifier.unitsManifest.description: Path (relative to the workspace) of the translation-unit manifest to verify.

crossLangVerifier.confirm.description: Run the live re-execution confirmation step (compile & run) when toolchains are available.
